name.min: Name must not be less than 3 characters

1.name: Smartphone Ultra
1.description: Latest generation smartphone with a stunning OLED display and pro-grade camera system.

2.name: Mechanical Keyboard
2.description: Tactile mechanical keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting and wrist rest.

3.name: 4K Ultra HD Monitor
3.description: 27-inch 4K monitor with color accuracy perfect for graphic design and gaming.

4.name: Wireless Earbuds
4.description: Compact wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and a wireless charging case.

5.name: Ergonomic Office Chair
5.description: Breathable mesh back office chair with adjustable lumbar support.

6.name: Portable SSD 1TB
6.description: High-speed portable solid-state drive with drop protection.

7.name: HD Web Camera
7.description: 1080p webcam with dual stereo microphones and an auto-focus lens.

8.name: Bluetooth Portable Speaker
8.description: Waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 20 hours of battery life and deep bass.

9.name: Fitness Yoga Mat
9.description: Non-slip, eco-friendly yoga mat with alignment lines.
